entities.name: INDIAN WOMEN OF REPRODUCTIVE AGE
entities.description: Women of reproductive age in India who were the subjects of the study

entities.name: ANAEMIA
entities.description: A medical condition characterized by a deficiency of red blood cells or haemoglobin

entities.name: HAEMOGLOBIN
entities.description: A protein in red blood cells used as a diagnostic marker for anaemia

entities.name: PLASMA FERRITIN
entities.description: A protein that stores iron, used as a marker for body iron stores

entities.name: IRON-FOLIC ACID SUPPLEMENTATION
entities.description: The administration of iron and folic acid to treat or prevent anaemia

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL MIXED EFFECTS MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to estimate the response curve of haemoglobin to plasma ferritin

entities.name: POLYNOMIAL MEAN AND VARIANCE MODEL
entities.description: A model used to account for intraclass correlation due to repeated measures within the hierarchical mixed effects model

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study population is located

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC CUT-OFF
entities.description: The threshold value of haemoglobin used to define the presence of anaemia
